content.intro: The Reposit integration enables you to offer deposit replacement to tenants via Offers V2 and complete Reposit sales with one click from the Tenancies tab.

steps.title: Go to Settings → Deposits → Reposit
steps.content: Navigate to Settings, open the Deposits section, and find the Reposit integration panel.

steps.title: Enter Your Reposit Credentials
steps.content: Enter your Reposit agent account credentials or API key. These are available from your Reposit agent portal.

steps.title: Save
steps.content: Click Save to connect the integration and verify your credentials.

steps.title: Offer Reposit via Offers V2
steps.content: Once connected, tick the Reposit checkbox when sending offers via Offers V2. Tenants will see Reposit as a deposit option on their offer form.

steps.title: Complete a Reposit Sale
steps.content: If a tenant selects Reposit and becomes a tenant, open their tenancy record and click 'Complete Reposit Sale' to finalise the Reposit product with one click.

sections.title: What is Reposit?
sections.content: Reposit allows tenants to pay a small non-refundable fee (typically equivalent to one week's rent) instead of a traditional cash deposit of five or six weeks' rent. The landlord retains full protection against damages and unpaid rent through the Reposit guarantee.

sections.title: Offer Unithomes at the Same Time
sections.content: You can offer Unithomes (a similar deposit replacement product) alongside Reposit at the same time from the Offers V2 send modal, giving tenants the widest choice of deposit options.
